title: Cryptanalysis of the Legendre PRF
description: Existing techniques and algorithms for cryptanalysis of the Legendre Pseudo-Random Function.

title: Graham-Entringer-Szekely Theorem
description: A proof that any spanning tree of the k-cube has a non-tree edge whose addition creates a cycle of length at least 2k.

title: Mapping the Max-Cut Problem to Ising Spin Glasses
description: Reducing Max-Cut to finding ground states of an Ising spin-glass Hamiltonian.

title: Stochastic Modeling of Ising Spin Glasses via Metropolis-Hastings
description: Using Metropolis-Hastings and simulated annealing on Ising spin-glass systems.

title: MPC in the Head (MPCitH)
description: Constructing zero-knowledge proofs by simulating multi-party computation protocols in the head.

title: Gentry-Lee Encoding for Efficient Matrix FHE
description: Breaking down the encoding behind the new Gentry-Lee FHE scheme.

title: Need for Gadget Decomposition in LWE Based Cryptosystems
description: Why gadget decomposition is necessary for noise control in LWE-based homomorphic operations.
